name: CaliberCos Inc.
business: CaliberCos Inc. is a diversified alternative asset management firm with over $2.6 billion in Managed Assets, investing across real and digital assets. It sponsors and manages private real estate investment funds and maintains a digital asset treasury strategy focused on blockchain infrastructure assets, currently holding Chainlink (LINK) tokens. The company targets accredited investor clients seeking to make investments in real and digital assets.

exposures.sentence: We sponsor and manage private real estate investment funds and maintain a digital asset treasury strategy focused on blockchain infrastructure assets, starting with Chainlink tokens ( LINK ).

digital asset treasury strategy is designed to complement our core real estate investment platform by providing exposure to blockchain-based financial infrastructure and generating yield through staking activities.

We are evaluating potential applications of blockchain technology within our real estate investment platform, including initiatives designed to improve operational efficiency, investor servicing, and accessibility. These efforts may include the tokenization of real-world assets, such as real estate projects and fund interests, to facilitate fractional ownership, enhance liquidity, and streamline investor reporting and fund administration.

As of December 31, 2025, we are actively developing 1,796 multifamily units, 697 single family units, 3.7 million square feet of commercial and industrial space, and 3.5 million square feet of office and retail space.
